description: Mock registration: a first-time (non-renewal) International Driving Permit application filed by an Indonesian citizen applicant who already holds a national Class A SIM, opting to pay online. All values are fabricated illustrative test data, not a real person's information. Since this is a first-time (not renewal) registration, the existingInternationalLicence document is correctly not supplied, and since the applicant is an Indonesian citizen (not a foreign national), the kitap document is correctly not supplied either — both are illustrated as omitted in the accompanying document checklist, consistent with the schema's own conditional-by-description modelling of those two entries.

documents.kitap: not applicable (Indonesian citizen, not a foreign national)
documents.existingInternationalLicence: not applicable (first-time registration, not a renewal)
documents.registrationFee: supplied (Rp250,000 new-issuance PNBP fee, paid via BNI virtual account, plus a variable courier fee)
